docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR OCT-02-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 404
DROPPED FROM CALENDAR (ADV TO 9/19/01 IN DEPT 403)

ADDED TO CALENDAR, CALENDAR MOTION: HEARING, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER, CALENDAR MOTION: CHILD CUSTODY, CALENDAR MOTION: VISITATION HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2001 AT 03:00 PM IN DEPT 403
CONTINUED (FR9/19/01), CALENDAR MOTION: OTHER HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 403
(403/CWW) PET IN PRO PER; RESP IN PRO PER; FCS KAREN BURNS. PARTIES SWORN AND EXAMINED. CS ISSUES SHALL BE BROUGHT IN DEPT. 416. UNDER FC 6305 A MUTUAL R/O IS APPRO
PRIATE; SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE WAS PRESENTED BY BOTH PARTIES. BOTH PARTIES ACTED AS MUTUAL AGGRESSORS AND NEITHER ACTED PRIMARILY IN SELF DEFENSE. GOOD
ARM RELINQUISHMENT SATISFIED BY SWORN TESTIMONY. PET MAY RECORD PROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS MADE BY RESTRAINED PARTY. FC 3044 DOES NOT APPLY BECAUSE
SHALL NOT BE REMOVED FROM 9 BAY AREA COUNTIES WITHOUT PRIOR WRITTEN AGREEMENT OR COURT ORDER. RESP SHALL HAVE CV ALTERNATE WEEKENDS BEGINNING 9/28/01
CHILD CARE BY 9/20/01 AT 11A. CONT. TO 10/24/01 AT 9:30A FOR PROOF ENROLLMENT IN BATTERER'S PROGRAM. IF PARTY PROVIDES MS. BURN W/ PROOF
REVIEW CV IN THREE MONTHS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, #5797.
FINDINGS AND ORDER AFTER HEARING MICROFILMED REEL/BATCH F:378-19
